사도행전 11:1.content: Now the apostles and the brothers who were in Judea heard that the Gentiles had also received the word of God.

사도행전 11:2.content: When Peter had come up to Jerusalem, those who were of the circumcision contended with him,

사도행전 11:3.content: saying, “You went in to uncircumcised men, and ate with them!”

사도행전 11:4.content: But Peter began, and explained to them in order, saying,

사도행전 11:5.content: “I was in the city of Joppa praying, and in a trance I saw a vision: a certain container descending, like it was a great sheet let down from heaven by four corners. It came as far as me.

사도행전 11:6.content: When I had looked intently at it, I considered, and saw the four-footed animals of the earth, wild animals, creeping things, and birds of the sky.

사도행전 11:7.content: I also heard a voice saying to me, ‘Rise, Peter, kill and eat!’

사도행전 11:8.content: But I said, ‘Not so, Lord, for nothing unholy or unclean has ever entered into my mouth.’

사도행전 11:9.content: But a voice answered me the second time out of heaven, ‘What God has cleansed, don’t you call unclean.’

사도행전 11:10.content: This was done three times, and all were drawn up again into heaven.

사도행전 11:11.content: Behold, immediately three men stood before the house where I was, having been sent from Caesarea to me.

사도행전 11:12.content: The Spirit told me to go with them, without discriminating. These six brothers also accompanied me, and we entered into the man’s house.

사도행전 11:13.content: He told us how he had seen the angel standing in his house, and saying to him, ‘Send to Joppa, and get Simon, who is called Peter,

사도행전 11:14.content: who will speak to you words by which you will be saved, you and all your house.’

사도행전 11:15.content: As I began to speak, the Holy Spirit fell on them, even as on us at the beginning.

사도행전 11:16.content: I remembered the word of the Lord, how he said, ‘John indeed baptized in water, but you will be baptized in the Holy Spirit.’

사도행전 11:17.content: If then God gave to them the same gift as us, when we believed in the Lord Jesus Christ, who was I, that I could withstand God?”

사도행전 11:18.content: When they heard these things, they held their peace, and glorified God, saying, “Then God has also granted to the Gentiles repentance to life!”

사도행전 11:19.content: They therefore who were scattered abroad by the oppression that arose about Stephen traveled as far as Phoenicia, Cyprus, and Antioch, speaking the word to no one except to Jews only.

사도행전 11:20.content: But there were some of them, men of Cyprus and Cyrene, who, when they had come to Antioch, spoke to the Hellenists, preaching the Lord Jesus.

사도행전 11:21.content: The hand of the Lord was with them, and a great number believed and turned to the Lord.

사도행전 11:22.content: The report concerning them came to the ears of the assembly which was in Jerusalem. They sent out Barnabas to go as far as Antioch,

사도행전 11:23.content: who, when he had come, and had seen the grace of God, was glad. He exhorted them all, that with purpose of heart they should remain near to the Lord.

사도행전 11:24.content: For he was a good man, and full of the Holy Spirit and of faith, and many people were added to the Lord.

사도행전 11:25.content: Barnabas went out to Tarsus to look for Saul.

사도행전 11:26.content: When he had found him, he brought him to Antioch. For a whole year they were gathered together with the assembly, and taught many people. The disciples were first called Christians in Antioch.

사도행전 11:27.content: Now in these days, prophets came down from Jerusalem to Antioch.

사도행전 11:28.content: One of them named Agabus stood up, and indicated by the Spirit that there should be a great famine all over the world, which also happened in the days of Claudius.

사도행전 11:29.content: As any of the disciples had plenty, each determined to send relief to the brothers who lived in Judea;

사도행전 11:30.content: which they also did, sending it to the elders by the hands of Barnabas and Saul.
